results.rendered_html:
vanecara a. [vane carati cara-ṭa aluk sa˚] Dwelling in a wood.
— raḥ
1 A forester, woodman; vanecarāṇāṃ vanitāsakhānāṃ  Ku. 1. 10 ;  Ki. 1. 1. 
2 An ascetic, a hermit.
3 A wild beast.
4 A sylvan, satyr.
5 A demon.
